untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern recognition requires visual/structural pattern detection (formation of two lows with peaks in between) which cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV indicators alone. Volume pattern classification (rising/falling/U-shaped/dome-shaped) also requires pattern analysis beyond available indicators. Success rates are context-dependent on bull/bear regime but specific pattern formation logic is not translatable.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot breakouts with volume confirmation as a proxy for diamond bottom breakout, but the core pattern detection (diamond formation geometry) and volume pattern shape analysis (U-shaped vs dome-shaped) cannot be accurately represented with the allowed indicators. Signal requires custom pattern recognition beyond standard technical indicators.
